activities_projects.title: Revolt of 1857 Basic Facts
activities_projects.objective: Learn the basic facts about the Revolt of 1857
steps: Write the year the Revolt of 1857 started
Write the place where the revolt began
Write the name of one leader of the revolt
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Understands basic facts about the Revolt of 1857

activities_projects.title: Important Leaders List
activities_projects.objective: Identify leaders of the Revolt of 1857
steps: Write the names of three leaders of the revolt
Write the place each leader was associated with
Write one action taken by any one leader
activities_projects.learning_outcome: Recognises important leaders of the revolt

activities_projects.title: Causes of the Revolt
activities_projects.objective: Understand the reasons for the Revolt of 1857
steps: Write two causes of the revolt
Explain why the soldiers were unhappy
Write one effect of the revolt

activities_projects.title: Timeline Activity
steps: Write the year the revolt started
Write the year the revolt ended
Arrange these events in chronological order

activities_projects.title: Picture Observation
steps: Look at a picture related to the Revolt of 1857
Write what you see in the picture
Explain what it tells about the revolt

activities_projects.title: Short Note Writing
steps: Write a short note on Mangal Pandey
Include where he worked
Explain why he is remembered

activities_projects.title: Match the Following
steps: Write leaders like Rani Lakshmibai, Bahadur Shah Zafar, Nana Sahib
Write their related places
Match the leaders with the correct place

activities_projects.title: Role of Soldiers
activities_projects.objective: Understand the role of sepoys in the revolt
steps: Write who the sepoys were
Explain why they were unhappy with the British
Write one action they took during the revolt

activities_projects.title: Important Places of the Revolt
activities_projects.objective: Identify places where the revolt occurred
steps: Mark Meerut on the map
Mark Delhi on the map
Write why these places were important in the revolt

activities_projects.title: Class Discussion
activities_projects.objective: Understand the results of the Revolt of 1857
steps: Discuss what happened after the revolt ended
Write two changes introduced by the British government
Write one lesson learned from the revolt
